anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Koan and huatou practice, plus Shinran's own reply to Senshin, show that a question may be deliberately used, answered, or transformed rather than simply permitted or refused.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in the broad teaching line. Supports a narrower model with values for permitted question, refused question, transformed question, question-as-medicine, teacher-held question, and undecidable.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: A question that looks wrong from outside can be the authorized method inside a lineage. Also, Shinran refuses self-calculation while still answering doctrinal questions about cause, assurance, and entrusting. This strains any simple permitted versus refused coding.

claim_units: A teaching permits some practitioner questions and refuses others.
An imported question can create a false distance, such as attainment to prove, result to manage, or state to defend.
Wrong-question imports should be coded before remainder, support, or completion models.
The modern human-condition fit is burnout, loneliness, meaning loss, and achievement-contingent self-worth when practice becomes a private scoreboard.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: software incident response and organizational learning
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams that first code the question being asked will produce more concrete system repairs and less defensive reporting than teams that move directly to what remains to fix or who owns the failure.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A blameless postmortem permits system and repair questions, while an imported ownership or blame question creates defensiveness and false distance from the event.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If postmortem quality is explained by psychological safety, manager behavior, severity, or process maturity, and question coding adds no measurable prediction.

exact_claim: Before asking what remains after self-negation, identify the question the teaching permits. Carrying a crossing, ownership, or proof question into a no-distance, received, or non-self-owned teaching can create the distance, private performance, and failure pattern the teaching was meant to undo.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can identify a source's permitted, refused, or transformed question before reading outcome passages, and those labels predict held-out warnings or repairs better than sentence-role, support-holder, tradition label, or VCE-factor baselines alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The imported-question variable is real and separable from prior models.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: A/B inter-rater coding on SN 22.59, SN 22.95, Shinran letters, Tannisho, Bendowa, Huangbo, Dzogchen direct introduction, and Rinzai koan materials.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders need outcome passages to infer the question, cannot agree, or the variable adds no predictive power beyond existing source-role and correction-holder rubrics.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Dual-trained practitioners report that carrying a crossing or proof question into no-distance or Other Power settings increases self-grading, private certainty, defensiveness, or withdrawal, while carrying a repair question into ethical-return contexts increases responsibility and reachability.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Wrong-question imports create distinctive practitioner failures.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Structured practitioner interviews asking for concrete failed-student and repair cases, not agreement with the wording.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Failures track trauma, isolation, sleep, teacher harm, intensity, or institutional culture better than imported question type.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Question Before Distance reduces proof-seeking and self-surveillance after quiet states more than ordinary journaling, while increasing ordinary action and willingness to receive correction.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The practice candidate has a bounded benefit.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Four-arm pilot with screened stable practitioners: question check, journaling, rest-and-plan, and ordinary support prompt.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: It increases rumination, shame, avoidance, isolation, reassurance seeking, or performs no better than rest, honest conversation, or a simple social-support prompt.

literature_search_queries: Collingwood logic of question and answer presuppositions spiritual practice
Gadamer priority of the question understanding application hermeneutics
Austin felicity conditions performative utterance religious language practice
Lindbeck doctrine grammar religion practice training rules
Asad discursive tradition correct form purpose practice authority
wrong question spiritual bypassing meditation self improvement burnout

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate isolates the imported practitioner question as the first failure variable before post-negation remainder coding.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade. Merge unless a blind distinct-content test shows the question variable changes decisions.
near_neighbors.overlap: These records already require coding sentence role, source role, authority, repair, and whether a question or method has become judge.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary prior: First Ask What the Words Do, When Tools Become Judges, No Word Travels Alone, Stop When The Repair Changes, and Some Paths Refuse The Question Of What Remains from this batch

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate moves from philosophical interpretation to practitioner failure prediction after contemplative insight.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for the structural claim; extension remains in the practice-safety application.
near_neighbors.overlap: Collingwood already holds that propositions function as answers to questions and that presuppositions give rise to questions.
near_neighbors.source: R. G. Collingwood, logic of question and answer, Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/collingwood/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate operationalizes the imported question as a codeable mismatch in no-distance and received paths.
near_neighbors.overlap: Gadamer already emphasizes the priority of the question, historically effected understanding, application, and the way prejudgments open and distort interpretation.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies felicity-like conditions to spiritual questions, not only utterances, and predicts self-surveillance failures.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. The analogy is useful but not original as language-action theory.
near_neighbors.overlap: Austin already shows that utterances do things only under fitting procedures, participants, and circumstances, and can misfire when conditions are wrong.
near_neighbors.source: J. L. Austin, How to Do Things with Words, https://web.english.upenn.edu/~cavitch/pdf-library/Austin_How_To_Do_Things_with_Words.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate narrows correct form and purpose to the practitioner's initiating question after self-negation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for the tradition-held permission claim.
near_neighbors.overlap: Asad already treats tradition as discourse instructing practitioners about correct form and purpose, with authority and correction internal to practice.
near_neighbors.source: Talal Asad, The Idea of an Anthropology of Islam, https://voidnetwork.gr/wp-content/uploads/2016/09/The-Idea-of-an-Anthropology-of-Islam-by-Talal-Asad.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate predicts a specific modern failure when a self-owned completion question violates that grammar.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade; retain only as empirical-practice extension.
near_neighbors.overlap: Lindbeck already makes doctrine a rule or grammar regulating religious speech and practice.
near_neighbors.source: George Lindbeck cultural-linguistic doctrine-as-grammar summaries, https://people.bu.edu/wwildman/bce/mwt_themes_862_lindbeck.htm and https://scielo.org.za/scielo.php?pid=S2074-77052018000100007&script=sci_arttext

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate distinguishes wrong-question imports from general avoidance or adverse-event factors.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade and important baseline for tests.
near_neighbors.overlap: These already identify spiritual language and practice as ways to avoid unfinished psychological or relational work, and show that interpretation and management influence meditation difficulties.
near_neighbors.source: Spiritual bypassing and VCE safety sources, https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/19349637.2017.1417756 and https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Cross-index or merge with Some Paths Refuse The Question Of What Remains, First Ask What The Words Do, When Tools Become Judges, No Word Travels Alone, Stop When The Repair Changes, and Some Help Should Not Be Managed.

Build a question-permission codebook with values for crossing, receiving, enacting, repairing, waiting, refusing ownership, question-as-medicine, teacher-held question, no-question frame, unsafe-question, clinical-routing, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.

Run a blind distinct-content test against Some Paths Refuse The Question Of What Remains. Merge if readers cannot state the difference between precondition gate and imported-question failure variable.
Use split-source coding and do not let the same passage establish permitted question and confirm the predicted warning or repair.
Add koan practice, Shinran doctrinal Q&A, and valid solitude as anomaly cases before public use.

For human-condition fit, keep the practice narrow: stable over-managers, burned-out self-improvers, and perfectionistic practitioners. Exclude acute loneliness without support, OCD, scrupulosity, dissociation, psychosis, mania, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, unsafe authority, medical concern, and cases requiring direct accountability or clinical care.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.57 to 0.39. The structural logic is heavily anticipated by Collingwood, Gadamer, Austin, Asad, Lindbeck, spiritual-bypassing research, VCE, and local Lumenary sentence-role and no-management records. Preserve as an extended test protocol only if the imported-question field predicts failures and repairs beyond those baselines.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Originality falls if practitioners say every tradition already teaches this as right question, right view, proper intention, doctrine as grammar, spiritual direction, or koan pedagogy, and if the question field fails to change real screening or repair decisions.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Support rises if practitioners can identify wrong-question imports as a recurring failure pattern, use the distinction before seeing outcomes, and show repairs that differ from generic rest, social contact, or teacher correction.
questions: What question does this teaching allow the practitioner to ask at this stage?
What question commonly causes harm, spiritual performance, or withdrawal in your setting?
Can you name cases where changing the question changed the repair, rather than merely changing language?
Is this just hermeneutics, doctrine-as-grammar, spiritual direction, or ordinary teacher judgment in new terms?
Would this codebook predict warnings or repairs before knowing the outcome?
relevant_practitioners: religion scholars familiar with Asad and Lindbeck
clinicians familiar with burnout, perfectionism, rumination, OCD, and scrupulosity

primary_pair: SN 22.59, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html, read against Shinran's reply to Senshin, https://shinranworks.com/letters/a-collection-of-letters-zensho-text/what-we-call-other-power/

Dogen Bendowa excerpts and Soto shusho itto, https://afe.easia.columbia.edu/ps/japan/dogen.pdf and https://global.sotozen-net.or.jp/eng/library/key_terms/pdf/key_terms07.pdf, read against Huangbo, https://selfdefinition.org/zen/huang-po/transmission/a2-chun-chou-record-cont.htm
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: Moderate to high. The model can collapse hermeneutics, speech-act theory, doctrine-as-grammar, and spiritual-bypassing triage into Lumenary language. It can also make permitted-question coding too subtle for reliable use. Human-condition fit is plausible for stable over-managers, burned-out self-improvers, isolated app meditators, caregivers, founders, and students. It is not for acute loneliness without support, clinical rumination, OCD or scrupulosity, dissociation, psychosis, mania, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, unsafe teacher settings, or cases needing direct accountability.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Read Collingwood, Gadamer, Austin, Searle, Asad, Lindbeck, Sharf, Katz, Pargament, spiritual bypassing research, VCE, Cheetah House, Pure Land studies on hakarai and Other Power, Dogen scholarship on practice-realization, and koan curriculum scholarship by Hori or Rinzai specialists before raising novelty.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: SN 22.59 permits a disciplined question sequence: is this aggregate controllable, permanent, easeful, fit to regard as mine, self, or what I am? Shinran answers a doctrinal question by refusing calculation on the practicer and relocating assurance to Other Power. Dogen blocks separation of cultivation and realization, while still warning against clever slogans and requiring practice. Huangbo explicitly challenges the question What is the Way and how must it be followed? The candidate's strongest form is not that questions are bad, but that each source licenses a different question grammar with different failure modes.

title: The Question Can Make the Distance
unlike_statement: Unlike Collingwood, Gadamer, Austin, Asad, Lindbeck, spiritual-bypassing research, and prior Lumenary sentence-role records, this idea predicts that the practitioner's imported question itself is a codeable failure variable that can create post-insight distance before any remainder question is asked.
